rules.reason: ChatGPT parser strips role labels that come from the source site's own conversation headers.
rules.revisit: Recheck if ChatGPT header parsing stops relying on source-site role labels.

rules.reason: ChatGPT parser strips assistant role labels that come from the source site's own conversation headers.
rules.revisit: Recheck if ChatGPT header parsing stops relying on source-site assistant role labels.

rules.reason: Doubao parser matches the source site's native brand token in avatar/title parsing; it is not extension UI copy.
rules.revisit: Recheck if Doubao DOM parsing stops depending on the native brand token.

rules.reason: Doubao parser recognizes source-site model labels and variants from native page text, not extension-authored fallback copy.
rules.revisit: Recheck if Doubao model detection stops using native model text tokens.

rules.reason: Kimi parser removes source-site action labels that are rendered inside native assistant toolbars.
rules.revisit: Recheck if Kimi parser stops depending on source-site assistant action labels.

rules.reason: Tongyi parser strips browser-title suffixes that belong to the source site, not to Zendio UI copy.
rules.revisit: Recheck if Tongyi title parsing stops using native browser-title suffixes.

rules.reason: Tongyi parser strips the source site's marketing browser-title suffix, not extension-authored UI copy.
rules.revisit: Recheck if Tongyi title parsing stops using native marketing suffixes.

rules.reason: Tongyi parser strips the source site's browser-title product suffix, not extension-authored UI copy.
rules.revisit: Recheck if Tongyi title parsing stops using native product suffixes.

rules.reason: Tongyi parser checks the source site's browser-title placeholder before falling back to a derived export title.
rules.revisit: Recheck if Tongyi title parsing stops comparing against the native browser-title placeholder.
